name: REGL

unions.name: TextureMagOption
unions.comment:
The magnification option for textures.

Users should use `MagLinear` for most cases.
However, if pixel art is used, `MagNearest` should be used.

unions.name: TextureMinOption
unions.comment:
The minification option for textures.

Similar to the magnification option, users should use `MinLinear` for most cases.

unions.name: TimeInterval
unions.comment:
A time interval for the REGL configuration.

Use `Millisecond` for fixed time intervals, and `AnimationFrame` for rendering at the refresh rate of the display.

`Millisecond` should be considered as a debugging tool, and `AnimationFrame` should be used for production.

aliases.name: REGLConfig
aliases.comment: The user configuration for REGL. Differing from the starting options. Users could change this at runtime.

aliases.name: REGLStartConfig
aliases.comment:
The configuration for starting REGL.

`virtWidth` and `virtHeight` are the virtual width and height users defined.

`fboNum` is the number of framebuffers created.

`builtinPrograms` is a list of built-in programs that users want to enable.
aliases.type: { virtWidth : Basics.Float, virtHeight : Basics.Float, fboNum : Basics.Int, builtinPrograms : Maybe.Maybe (List.List String.String) }

aliases.name: Renderable
aliases.comment: A renderable object that can be rendered by REGL.

aliases.name: Texture
aliases.type: { name : String.String, width : Basics.Int, height : Basics.Int }

aliases.name: TextureOptions
aliases.type: { mag : Maybe.Maybe REGL.TextureMagOption, min : Maybe.Maybe REGL.TextureMinOption }

values.name: batchExec
values.comment: Execute a batch of commands.
values.type: REGL.ExecPort msg -> List.List (REGL.ExecPort msg -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg) -> List.List (Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg)

values.name: configREGL
values.comment: Reconfigure REGL at runtime.

values.name: createREGLProgram
values.comment: Create a user-defined REGL program.
values.type: String.String -> REGL.Program.REGLProgram -> REGL.ExecPort msg -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: decodeRecvMsg
values.comment: Decode a received message.

values.name: empty
values.comment: An empty renderable object.

values.name: genProg
values.comment: Generate a renderable object from settings. Users can use this function to create custom renderable generators.

values.name: group
values.comment: Group a list of renderables into a single renderable with effects.

values.name: loadMSDFFont
values.comment: Load a MSDF font.
values.type: String.String -> String.String -> String.String -> REGL.ExecPort msg -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: loadTexture
values.comment: Load a texture with name, url and options.
values.type: String.String -> String.String -> Maybe.Maybe REGL.TextureOptions -> REGL.ExecPort msg -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: render
values.comment: Render a renderable object. Users need to use it to pass the render result to REGL in JS through a port.

values.name: startREGL
values.comment: Execute the start command for REGL.

values.name: toHtmlWith
values.comment: Create the canvas HTML element.
values.type: { width : Basics.Int, height : Basics.Int } -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg

name: REGL.BuiltinPrograms

aliases.name: TextBoxOption
aliases.type: { font : String.String, text : String.String, size : Basics.Float, color : Color.Color, wordBreak : Basics.Bool, width : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Float, lineHeight : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Float, wordSpacing : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Float, align : Maybe.Maybe String.String, letterSpacing : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Float }

values.name: centeredTexture
values.comment: Render a texture with center, size and angle for rotation.
values.type: ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> Basics.Float -> String.String -> REGL.Common.Renderable

values.name: circle
values.comment: Render a circle with center, radius and color.

values.name: clear
values.comment: Clear the canvas with a color.

values.name: functionCurve
values.comment: Render a function curve with a function, offset, range, samples, and color.
values.type: (Basics.Float -> Basics.Float) -> ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> Basics.Float -> Color.Color -> REGL.Common.Renderable

values.name: lineloop
values.comment: Render a line loop with vertices and color.

values.name: lines
values.comment: Render lines with vertices and color.
values.type: List.List ( ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ), ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) ) -> Color.Color -> REGL.Common.Renderable

values.name: linestrip
values.comment: Render line strip with vertices and color.

values.name: poly
values.comment: Render a poly with vertices and color.

values.name: polyPrim
values.comment: Render a poly with vertices, element array, primitives and color.
values.type: List.List ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> List.List Basics.Float -> Color.Color -> REGL.BuiltinPrograms.Primitive -> REGL.Common.Renderable

values.name: primitiveToValue
values.comment: Convert a primitive to a value.

values.name: quad
values.comment: Render a quad with three vertices and color.
values.type: ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> Color.Color -> REGL.Common.Renderable

values.name: rectTexture
values.comment: Render a texture with left-bottom coordinates and size.
values.type: ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> String.String -> REGL.Common.Renderable

values.name: saveAsTexture
values.comment:
Save the current FBO as a texture.

This is only an experimental feature and should be used with caution.

values.name: textbox
values.comment: Render a textbox.
values.type: ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> Basics.Float -> String.String -> String.String -> Color.Color -> REGL.Common.Renderable

values.name: textboxPro
values.comment: Render a textbox with more options.

values.name: texture
values.comment: Render a texture with 4 points: left-bottom, right-bottom, right-top and left-top.
values.type: ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> String.String -> REGL.Common.Renderable

values.name: toRgbaList
values.comment: Convert a color to a list of RGBA values.

values.name: triangle
values.comment: Render a triangle with three vertices and color.
values.type: ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> Color.Color -> REGL.Common.Renderable

name: REGL.Compositors

values.name: dstOverSrc
values.comment: Draw the dst renderable over the src renderable.

values.name: imgFade
values.comment:
Fading effect using a mask image.

Mask image is a gradient image, similar to [this](https://github.com/linsyking/elm-regl/blob/main/docs/asset/mask.jpg).

values.name: linearFade
values.comment: Linear fading effect.

values.name: maskBySrc
values.comment: Draw the dst renderable masked by the src renderable.

name: REGL.Effects
comment:
# Effects

@docs blur, gblur, crt, fxaa, alphamult

values.name: alphamult
values.comment: Multiply the alpha of a renderable.

values.name: blur
values.comment: Blurs a renderable.

values.name: crt
values.comment: Simple CRT effect. Must be applied at the outermost layer.

values.name: fxaa
values.comment: Apply FXAA to a renderable.

values.name: gblur
values.comment: Blurs a renderable. Gaussian blur.

name: REGL.Program

unions.name: ProgValue
unions.comment: A value that can be either a static value or a dynamic value.

aliases.name: REGLProgram
aliases.comment: A custom program that can be used with REGL.
aliases.type: { frag : String.String, vert : String.String, attributes : Maybe.Maybe (List.List ( String.String, REGL.Program.ProgValue )), uniforms : Maybe.Maybe (List.List ( String.String, REGL.Program.ProgValue )), elements : Maybe.Maybe REGL.Program.ProgValue, primitive : Maybe.Maybe REGL.Program.ProgValue, count : Maybe.Maybe REGL.Program.ProgValue }

values.name: encodeProgram
values.comment: Encode a custom program to an object.

values.name: makeCompositorProgram
values.comment:
Make a custom composite program.

`src` and `dst` are the names of the texture uniforms in the program.

values.name: makeCompositorSimple
values.comment:
Make a custom composite program simply.

`t1` and `t2` are the names of the texture uniforms in the program.

values.name: makeEffectProgram
values.comment:
Make a custom effect program.

`texname` is the name of the texture uniform in the program.

values.name: makeEffectSimple
values.comment:
Make a custom effect program simply.

In the fragment shader, use `texture2D(texture, vuv)` to sample the texture.

You could also use `vec2 view` to get the size of virtual canvas.
